title: Eva Music Questions
wikitext:
[]: Eva Music Questions             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Fri Oct 05, 2007 1:06 pm For me, the music in Evangelion is as much a character in the story as anyone else. I snatched up the S2 works years ago and I still listen to it pretty regularly, it's really amazing. I've tried to learn a lot of the songs, I use to be able to play Rei I on piano pretty well, but it's been years. I learned Cruel Angel on guitar and tried to learn Komm Susser Todd. Has anyone else tried to learn any of the songs from Eva or studied the music thoroughly? I've seen the sheet music to the songs on a few websites, but their mostly sold out anymore. Any place left that might have some books or scans or tab? Also, anyone know if there are any plans to notate the music from Rebuild?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Oct 05, 2007 4:22 pm No idea sorry. However, I am interested in all the canons that appeared, and afew others.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Mon Oct 15, 2007 2:38 pm Another quick question, if someone were to find the notation of the pieces from Evangelion or were to try to notate them personally, would that be something that could be posted here or should it be avoided?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 15, 2007 3:13 pm I transcribed some songs a while ago for someone on ANF, don't even know if I still have them. There was also someone from here that wanted to play Asuka Strikes on the guitar, and I did it in a hurry, don't remember who it was. The sheet music is in pdf format and hosted on the EM website. Here's what I can find: http://www.tesuji.org/music/Asuka_strikes.tab http://www.tesuji.org/Barefoot_in_the_park.txt There's also a Jesu, Joy of Man's Desiring that I transcribed ages ago that I still have around, dunno how accurate it is, it's gotta be over 10 years old: http://www.tesuji.org/jesu_joy_of_mans_desiring.txt
